results.title: AI/Data Science Consultant – EPAM
highlights:
AI/Data Science Consultant – EPAM
...
AI/Data Science Consultant
...
# AI/Data Science Consultant
...
Join our team as an AI/Data Science Consultant in Stockholm, Sweden, working in a hybrid model. You will collaborate with a leading automotive client on their AI transformation journey, designing and optimizing AI-driven solutions. This role involves significant interaction with EPAM's European Data Practice, focusing on Generative AI and advanced data science solutions, with at least 3 days per week required on-site in Gothenburg.
...
## Beskrivning
...
We're looking for an AI/Data Science Consultant to join our team in Gothenburg Sweden, in a hybrid working mode. In this role, you will partner with a leading automotive client on their multi-year AI transformation journey. You will design, deploy and optimize AI-driven solutions, helping the client unlock new opportunities and navigate the evolving AI landscape. This position offers the opportunity to play a visible role in collaboration with EPAM's European Data Practice, delivering cutting-edge Generative AI (Gen AI) and advanced data science solutions. The ideal candidate will combine strong technical expertise in AI, Gen AI, machine learning and analytics with consulting experience to drive measurable business value. This role requires at least 3 days per week on the client site in Gothenburg. Responsibilities Design and build Agentic AI solutions ensuring compliance, transparency and auditability Lead the transition of AI/ML models from development to production with robust MLOps practices Monitor and manage model performance, including explainability and fairness Collaborate with client and EPAM teams to communicate AI opportunities, risks and strategies Support pre-sales activities including presentations, demos and RFP/RFI responses Design and implement innovative AI-driven products leveraging Gen AI technologies Lead development and deployment of Gen AI/ML models with focus on scalability and lifecycle management Apply LLMs and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to solve industry-specific challenges Ensure AI solutions adhere to responsible AI principles and regulatory requirements Requirements Bachelor's, Master's or PhD in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics or related field, or equivalent work experience Strong experience in AI, Gen AI, data science and analytics roles Proven ability to design and implement AI solutions with a focus on compliance and operational integrity Deep understanding of LLMs and their application in real-world scenarios Strong knowledge of MLOps principles and experience deploying AI/ML models Proficiency in Python and familiarity with AI/ML tools and platforms such as Azure, AWS, GCP, Databricks, MLFlow and Airflow Experience in IT consulting with the ability to manage client relationships and deliver strategic guidance Familiarity with AI regulatory frameworks, including the EU AI Act Strong communication skills to translate complex AI concepts into actionable insights for technical and business stakeholders Ability to contribute to the growth of EPAM's Data Practice in the Nordics region Nice to have Certifications in cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) or AI/ML specializations Experience with Gen AI frameworks (LangChain, Hugging Face, OpenAI APIs) and containerization tools (Docker, Kubernetes) Knowledge of data governance, ethical AI practices and industry-specific AI applications (e.g., automotive, manufacturing)
...
AI/Data Science Consultant

results.title: Principal (Director) Data Science Consultant Practice Lead – EPAM
highlights:
Principal (Director) Data Science Consultant Practice Lead – EPAM
...
Principal (Director) Data Science Consultant Practice Lead
...
# Principal (Director) Data Science Consultant Practice Lead
...
EPAM is driving digital transformation across Europe and we're expanding our Data Practice in Sweden to meet the rising demand for cutting-edge Generative AI (Gen AI) and advanced data solutions.We are looking for an experienced Principal (Director)Data Science Consultant Practice Lead with a strong focus on Gen AI applications across industries. In this role, you will design, deploy and optimize AI-driven solutions, helping organizations unlock new opportunities and navigate the evolving AI landscape.If you are passionate about leveraging AI to solve complex business challenges and create real impact, we invite you to join us in shaping the future of AI-driven innovationThe role offers exciting opportunities to play a highly visible role in partnership with the wider European data leadership teams to drive growth in the Nordics.RESPONSIBILITIES
...
- Provide technical leadership and strategic direction expertise with clients across industries to define and execute Gen AI strategies that align with their business goals
...
- Design and implement innovative AI-driven products, including customer personalization tools, demand forecasting systems, dynamic pricing solutions and operational automation
...
- Lead the development, deployment and monitoring of Gen AI/ML models with a strong focus on MLOps, operational scalability and model lifecycle management
...
- Leverage Gen AI technologies, including Large Language Models (LLMs) and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), to solve industry-specific challenges such as supply chain optimization, risk assessment, predictive maintenance and enhanced customer engagement
...
- Communicate AI strategies, opportunities and risks effectively with senior executives and cross-functional teams
...
- Ensure AI solutions are fair, explainable and aligned with responsible AI practices
...
- Work closely with legal and compliance teams to navigate industry regulations, including the EU AI Act and other emerging AI governance frameworks
...
- Stay ahead of industry trends, emerging Gen AI technologies and evolving regulatory landscapes
...
- Contribute to pre-sales activities, including client presentations, product demos and responses to RFPs/RFIs
...
- Bachelor's or Master's or PhD in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics or a related field or extensive relevant work experience
...
- Extensive experience in data science leadership roles with demonstrable impact across various industries. Experience in IT consulting is highly desirable
...
- Able to act as a diving force in developing and expanding the Nordics Practice footprint in partnership with the wider Data leadership teams
...
- Expertise in Gen AI, including Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and advanced AI applications
...
- Strong understanding of AI/ML tools and platforms such as Azure, AWS, GCP, Databricks, MLFlow and Streamlit
...
- Proficiency in Python and experience with frameworks like Airflow, Plotly Dash or similar tools
...
- Proven track record of implementing responsible AI practices, addressing bias and ensuring model explainability
...
- Strong communication skills with the ability to translate complex AI concepts into actionable insights for senior business leaders
...
- Familiarity with AI regulatory frameworks, including the EU AI Act and other relevant compliance standards
...
- Experience in pre-sales or supporting sales teams
...
Principal (Director) Data Science Consultant Practice Lead

highlights:
# Senior Director, Data Analytics Consulting - Remote
...
Are you an avid technologist who enjoys solving and driving complex Data & Analytics challenges? Are you hungry to thrive in a fast-paced entrepreneurial engineering environment and take ownership of critical technical and business decisions that directly impact EPAM and our clients?
...
As one of the worlds leading digital transformation service providers, we are looking to aggressively expand our Data Practice across North America to meet increasing client demand for our services. We are looking for people at the Senior Director and Director level within the Data & Analytics/Data Science Consulting Practice with a specific focus on Machine Learning (ML) and Artificial Intelligence (AI).
...
The roles offer exciting opportunities to work with leading-edge technologies, deliver ML/AI-driven solutions, and play a highly visible leading role in the organization whilst partnering closely with multiple clients across various industries and our Data leadership teams globally.
...
- Responsibilities
...
- Provide technical leadership and strategic direction expertise in ML and AI, driving the design, development, and implementation of ML/AI solutions for clients
...
- Connect across the organization to drive AI adoption in verticals, envision new products, solutions, offerings, and other differentiators
...
- Engage with clients to understand their business challenges and requirements, and effectively communicate how ML/AI solutions can address them
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define project scope, develop datasets, and apply appropriate ML algorithms to deliver high-quality solutions
...
- Shape ML solutions and properly scope/price engagements, establishing optimal operating models and project team organization, and leading the transition from the sales process to the delivery phase
...
- Engage client stakeholders, including executive / C-level, helping them drive enterprise-wide agenda to maximize AI adoption
...
- Stay updated with the latest advancements in ML/AI and emerging technologies, proactively recommending new approaches and methodologies to address challenges in the space/markets and geographies in which the clients operate
...
- Strong experience in a senior/leadership role within Data & Analytics/ML/AI as well as a proven track record in designing and implementing ML/AI solutions
...
- Knowledge and understanding of different architectures: CNN/RNN, Transformers, LLM, Multimodal, Foundation models, etc
...
- Solid understanding of ML algorithms, both classical and Deep Learning based
...
- Demonstrated leadership experience, driving internal and external multi-dimensional teams to deliver AI products
...
- Demonstrated experience in engaging and influencing senior stakeholders to secure funding or sell ML/AI projects
...
- Strong communication skills, with the ability to

complex technical concepts

audiences, capable

A Technical Lead with 9+ years of experience, I specialize in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and data science. My expertise is built on a strong foundation in designing and delivering scalable, cutting-edge solutions across diverse industries, from healthcare and finance to manufacturing, infrastructure, and automotive. I bring hands-on proficiency with a broad spectrum of technologies, including: Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, PHP, Golang, TypeScript, and Node.js. Cloud Platforms: AWS (Amazon Web Services), Microsoft Azure. results.title: Vera Kochetkova
highlights:
Data Scientist | AI/ML Engineer | 5+ years of ML development, Agents, RAG, Recommender Systems | Science Fan🧬
...
Data Scientist at [EPAM Systems](https://www.linkedin.com/company/epam-systems)
...
I am a Data Scientist/ ML Engineer with 5 years of experience in Machine Learning, delivering end-to-end machine learning solutions across Life Sciences and internal enterprise platforms. My core expertise includes LLM-based applications, Natural Language Processing and Recommender Systems. I’ve built and deployed AI products that personalise content, extract insights from complex scientific data, and streamline knowledge workflows for thousands of users. In NLP and LLMs, I’ve led multiple projects including the development of a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system for biomedical researchers. It automated the review of 200+ scientific documents and patents, generating context-rich summaries with 97%+ retrieval precision and 80%+ answer relevancy — significantly accelerating scientific research. I also created advanced transcription and summarisation features for long-form video content using Whisper and GPT, increasing accessibility. One of my best results in Recommender Systems - improving an internal video recommendation engine, achieving a 5x increase in video play rate and 2x user engagement over a year by delivering personalised content. Beyond modelling, I’ve implemented MLOps practices (CI/CD pipelines, deployment automation), handled cross-platform integrations, and collaborated directly with stakeholders to align AI features with business value. With a degree in theoretical astrophysics, I bring a strong foundation in scientific thinking and data interpretation, which I now channel toward impactful AI products. I’m especially motivated to contribute to Life Science and Sustainability initiatives, aiming to apply data science where it can drive real-world progress in health, environment, and knowledge discovery.
...
### Data Scientist at [EPAM Systems](https://www.linkedin.com/company/epam-systems) (Current)
...
- Enhanced scientific research efficiency from 3 days to 3 hours when analysing 10 years of data for neuroscientists by developing the end-to-end AI service with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and summarization steps.
...
- Achieved over 97% of retrieval content precision and more than 80% of answer relevancy by fine-tuning parameters and prompt engineering for GPT model inside AI service.
...
- Created AI service for Client’s medical and biological researchers that provides accurate and context-aware summaries for research questions, as the only Data Scientist in the cross-functional team. - Developed end-to-end the Complex pipeline that contains Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and summarization steps using Azure AI Search, GPT model and Langchain, as a main algorithm inside the client’s service, with over 97% of retrieval content precision, nearly 99% of fairness, and more than 80% of answer relevancy, based on evaluation metrics. - Implemented automatic indexing pipeline that processes 10+ years of scientific data from Data Engineers and creates precomputing vectors for RAG, which reduces query latency of the service and enables near real-time biomedical search. - Increased indexing speed by 3x by implementing parallel pipelines distributed across Azure regions, enabling faster ingestion of new data. - Drove the AI service from MVP to Production stage, ensuring optimal performance while minimizing resource usage, by communicating with client and team, identifying and implementing modern models with more resource-effective parameter settings. For example, switching to the new embedding model, that reduced storage usage by 95%. - Enabled continuous delivery by setting up separate Azure pipelines both for indexing and summarization systems, reducing deployment errors and achieving stable service availability. Skills: Python, Azure, Langchain, LLM (OpenAI models) Show less

results.title: EPAM Systems AI Engineer Interview Questions & Guide 2026
highlights:
EPAM Systems AI Engineer Interview
...
EPAM Systems AI Engineer Interview Questions & Guide 2026
...
EPAM SystemsAI Engineer
...
EPAM Systems AI Engineer interview questions & guide
...
### What is an AI Engineer at EPAM Systems?
...
As an **AI Engineer** at **EPAM Systems**, you will operate at the intersection of advanced software engineering and cutting-edge artificial intelligence. **EPAM Systems** is a premier global provider of digital platform engineering and software development services. In this role, you are not just building isolated models; you are designing, deploying, and scaling enterprise-grade Generative AI (**GenAI**) solutions that drive tangible business value for Fortune 500 clients across various industries.
...
The impact of an **AI Engineer** at **EPAM Systems** is immense. You will be responsible for architecting robust **Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)** pipelines, building complex conversational agents, and orchestrating multi-agent systems. These technologies directly transform how clients interact with their data, automate complex workflows, and enhance user experiences at scale.
...
What makes this position exceptionally compelling is the sheer variety and scale of the problems you will solve. You will work on real-world projects that require a deep understanding of Large Language Models (**LLMs**), modern orchestration frameworks, and clean software engineering practices. It is a highly collaborative, fast-paced environment where your technical decisions directly shape the digital transformation journeys of global enterprises.
...
AM Systems** evaluates both
...
software engineering skills and your practical
...
AI** solutions. The
...
identify key patterns in what
...
hiring teams look for.
...
### Generative AI & Orchestration Frameworks
...
* Explain the difference between fine-tuning an **LLM** and utilizing a **RAG** pipeline. When is each approach appropriate?
...
**Practical GenAI Architecture** – You will be evaluated on your ability to design real-world AI systems. Be prepared to discuss the nuances of orchestration frameworks, vector databases, and agentic workflows. Focus on explaining *why* you made specific architectural choices in your past projects.
...
As an **AI Engineer** at **EPAM Systems**, your day-to-day work will span the entire lifecycle of enterprise AI applications. You will be responsible for translating complex client requirements into scalable, production-ready architectures.
...
* **Design and Implement GenAI Solutions** – Architect and build end-to-end applications utilizing **LLMs**, custom **RAG** pipelines, and conversational agents.
...
To be competitive for the **AI Engineer** position at **EPAM Systems**, you must demonstrate a strong blend of traditional software engineering discipline and specialized AI expertise.
...
on experience with orchestration frameworks such as **LangChain** or **LangGraph**.
...
* Solid understanding of **LLM** architectures, prompt engineering, and evaluation methodologies.
...
The **AI Engineer** position at **EPAM Systems** offers an incredible opportunity to build and scale production-grade Generative AI solutions for some of the world's largest organizations. It is a role that demands a rare combination of rigorous software engineering discipline, deep AI domain expertise, and consultative communication skills.

results.title: Ganesh Kumar
highlights:
AI Engineer at EPAM | Python | Data Science | Deep Learning | NLP | Computer Vision | Generative AI | Azure | AWS | Docker
...
Software Engineer at [EPAM Systems](https://www.linkedin.com/company/epam-systems)
...
I’m a highly motivated and passionate professional with a strong foundation in software development and artificial intelligence. I hold a Bachelor's Degree in Electrical and Electronics Engineering from Karpagam College of Engineering, India. I have hands-on experience in building, fine-tuning, and deploying Generative AI (GenAI) applications using Python, PyTorch, Hugging Face, LangChain, FastAPI, MongoDB, and Docker, with a focus on financial document automation and AI-driven insights. My experience spans LLM-based model development, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and scalable deployment using TGI and containerized environments. I also have practical experience in Computer Vision projects, including Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR), object detection, and object tracking using YOLO and related deep learning frameworks. I enjoy working on projects that combine innovation and practical impact, continuously exploring new tools like OpenAI APIs, vector-based retrieval systems, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines. I’m driven by the challenge of transforming complex data and AI models into intelligent, production-ready solutions that deliver real-world value.
...
### Software Engineer at [EPAM Systems](https://www.linkedin.com/company/epam-systems) (Current)
...
* LLM-based Extraction for Financial Documents: Designed and implemented LLM workflows to extract structured data from financial documents, including profit & loss statements, balance sheets, and key metrics, ensuring high precision and consistency. * Prompt Engineering: Created and optimized advanced prompts for generative AI models to improve response accuracy, contextual understanding, and relevance across financial use cases. * LLM Fine-tuning: Fine-tuned foundation models such as LLaMA using domain-specific financial datasets to enhance performance on specialized document extraction and classification tasks. * RAG Pipeline for Financial Chatbot: Built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline for a financial document chatbot capable of answering context-aware queries using a combination of vector embeddings, document retrieval, and history-aware responses. * Web & Backend Development (FastAPI & MongoDB): Developed and integrated RESTful APIs using FastAPI for smooth interaction between the LLM services and frontend. Utilized MongoDB for storing extracted financial data, embeddings, and chatbot context efficiently. * Model Deployment using TGI (Text Generation Inference): Deployed fine-tuned models using Hugging Face TGI for scalable, low-latency inference. Integrated with FastAPI endpoints and optimized for production workloads using containerized environments.
...
